text.title: Plan Mode Then Locked Execution Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf references a rule id (including `skip-this-methodology`).

decision-tree.root-question: Does the change touch > 3 files OR run > 5 min of agent time OR include side-effects (DB / deploy / secrets)?

branch.when: scope_size <= 3 AND runtime_minutes < 5 AND side_effects == false

conclusion.verdict: trivial — Plan Mode overhead not justified
reject: planning harness can mutate state
reject: plan is vague or unbounded

text.example: 8-file refactor → plan with 6 numbered steps → approver alice signs PL-2026-0521-001 → executed verbatim → PR embeds plan_hash → review trivial.
